title: Cats Don't Laugh
overview: Rin is an immortal private eye with a taste for vodka and knack for attracting things that go bump in the night. On her latest case, she finds herself in the middle of a cloning conspiracy.

title: Angels Don't Sing
overview: When a man seeking a rare stamp enlists Asogi Consulting, the dead bodies start to pile up. As she struggles to make sense of the madness, Rin encounters a deadly angel roaming the streets.

title: Flowers Don't Shed Tears
overview: Decades ago, the army used Death Island as a testing ground for biological weapons. Rin is shocked to discover that her sadistic rival Sayara has returned to complete the heinous experiments.

title: Spirits Don't Scream
overview: The son of an old friend puts his life at risk for a real-world hook up with a virtual sex doll. Rin is ready to help, but this case may be too dangerous even for her.

title: The Holy Night Doesn't Shine
overview: Rin narrowly survived being mulched to death by a jet engine, but while her body slowly regenerated, her memories disappeared. Now, she must discover her past before Apos and his angels steal her future.

title: And to the Door of the Kingdom…
overview: Apos has something painful in mind for Rin, but he gets off on prolonging the agony. Unless Mimi wants to be alone forever, she’d better find her friend - and fast.
